title: POV: You scratched the couch and your boss is 18 months old 👶😺
description: POV: You scratched the couch and your boss is 18 months old 👶😺
prompt_text: A brightly lit, indoor setting with white walls and a light-colored wooden floor. A baby with dark curly hair, wearing a light green long-sleeved onesie, stands barefoot facing a cat. The cat, a tabby with folded ears (likely a Scottish Fold), stands on its hind legs, leaning against the white wall. The baby's hands are on the cat's chest, and the cat looks wide-eyed at the baby. The overall atmosphere is playful and endearing.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A brightly lit, indoor setting with white walls and a light-colored wooden floor. A baby with dark curly hair, wearing a light green long-sleeved onesie, stands barefoot facing a cat. The cat, a tabby with folded ears (likely a Scottish Fold), stands on its hind legs, leaning against the white wall. The baby's hands are on the cat's chest, and the cat looks wide-eyed at the baby. The overall atmosphere is playful and endearing.

cinematography.cameraShot: Eye-level medium shot, static. The camera captures the interaction between the baby and the cat from a slightly low angle, emphasizing their sizes relative to each other.

actions: The baby, standing, holds onto the cat's chest with both hands.
The cat stands on its hind legs, leaning against the wall, looking at the baby with wide eyes.
The baby appears to be speaking to the cat, moving their mouth.
The cat remains still, maintaining its standing posture against the wall.
The baby leans forward slightly, seemingly to get closer to the cat's face.
dialogue: [Child's voice, as if scolding]: Look at me. No meowing. I said no. You scratched the couch again, and then you meowed like it's my fault? Uh-uh. Not today, Mr. Whiskers. No. I said, don't. Be nice. Be-
